subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard, and the enkindled flame of thy love in the path of God hath been witnessed. Praise be unto God for this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت شنیده شد و اشتعال نار محبتت فی سبیل الله مشاهده گشت الحمد لله باینمقام
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @power of prayer
